headline: Trump Ditches Attack Mode 😤➡️😔 After Nurse BBQ Backlash 🔥👨‍⚕️💥
text:
Trump 🍊👨‍💼 and his MAGA 🚀 crew ABANDONED 🏃‍♂️💨 the 'DENY & ATTACK' playbook 📖🔥 after ICE ❄️🐷 agents SMOKED 😵💨 Minneapolis nurse Alex Pretti 👨‍⚕️📱 like a BAD BBQ 🍖🔥 on Saturday! Videos 📹🔥 DROPPING everywhere show Pretti just FILMING 👀📱 the fed goons shoving a lady 👩😱, helping her up 🤝, then PEPPER-SPRAYED 🌶️💦 and WRESTLED DOWN 🤼‍♂️ – NO GUN 🍆🔫 in sight when they CAP him 💥🩸! DHS 🛡️ Kristi Noem 🐶📢 called him a 'TERRORIST THIRSTY FOR BLOOD 🩸😈' brandishing weapons ⚔️, Border Patrol boss Gregory Bovino 🐮🚔 screamed 'MASSACRE MODE ACTIVATED 🩸🔪!', and Stephen Miller 👹📣 labeled him 'WOULD-BE ASSASSIN 🗡️💀' – straight fire 🔥 initially, but BACKLASH HIT HARDER THAN A TRUMP STEAK 🥩👊!

White House Press Sec Karoline Leavitt 💋🗣️ went MUTE 🤐 on Miller's psycho takes, dodging like 'FULL INVESTIGATION INCOMING 🕵️‍♂️🔍!' – TOTAL TONE SHIFT 😤➡️😔 cuz VIDEOS don't lie 📹✅, fam! Pretti's parents 😢👨‍👩‍👦 DROPPED a SAVAGE statement: 'Admin's SICK LIES 🤮 about our boy are REPUGNANT 🐷💩!' Local cops 🚔 say he was LEGAL GUN DADDY 🔫✅ under MN law – concealed carry PERMIT POPPIN' 🍆📜, not some psycho! Minneapolis PD chief Brian O'Hara 🧔🚓 SPILLED: 'We've ARRESTED HUNDREDS 😤🔒 without SHOOTING – this AIN'T SUSTAINABLE 🚫💥!'

Even GOP SIMPS 🐑🔴 getting SALTY 🧂! Vermont Gov Phil Scott 🌲🍎 called it 'FEDERAL FAILFEST 🤡🚫 or DELIBERATE INTIMIDATION 😈🇺🇸!' Utah Sen John Curtis 🧔📈 ROASTED Noem's 'PREMATURE EJACULATION RESPONSE 💦🚀 before facts!' House/Senate homeland chairs 📞🔥 planning PUBLIC HEARINGS 🎤🤬 to GRILL the feds! Trump pivoted HARD 🥊➡️🤝, posting 'TRAGIC 😢💔 – DEMOCRAT CHAOS UNLEASHED 🐙🔥!' echoed by VP JD Vance 🥜👨‍💼. VA Sec Doug Collins 🪖❤️ sent CONDOLENCES 💐 to fam, and Donnie dispatched BORDER CZAR Tom Homan 🛡️🍆 – Obama's old deportation daddy 👴❄️ who's 'TOUGH BUT FAIR ⚖️😎' – straight to MN to 'DIRECT THE DEPORTATION DANCE 💃🚔!'

Dems 🟦😡 AMPING UP 🔥 on Trump's MASS DEPORT ORGY 🚀❄️, threatening SHUTDOWN FRIDAY 🎉🚫 over ICE ABUSE 🐷😠! Sen Brian Schatz 🌺📢 vows 'NO DHS CASH 💰🚫 till ICE GETS LEASHED 🐕‍🦺!' MN AG Keith Ellison 🕌🧔 hopes Homan's the 'REASONABLE DADDY 🤝' but shades feds as 'UNREASONABLE KARENS 😤🚫!' Trump even CHATTED with Dem Gov Tim Walz 🧔🌽 – 'VERY GOOD CALL 📞👍, WE'RE ON THE SAME WAVELENGTH 🌊😏!' Cooling the HEAT 🔥➡️❄️ after weeks of BEEF 🥩😠. Polls 📊😩 show 61% say ICE TOO THUGGICY 🐷💪 on stops, 58% HATING Trump's immig HANDLING 🤬. GOP unease GROWING 🌱😰, Dems risking SHUTDOWN FLOPOVER like last autumn's HEALTH CARE FIASCO 🤦‍♂️💸 – but Trump's DEPORT DREAMS 🚀🇺🇸 at STAKE, core to his WHITE HOUSE REDEMPTION ARC 🏰🍊! Powder keg TICKING 💣⏰, will it BLOW or FIZZLE? 🎆🤷‍♂️
